title: prangos asperula
intro: Prangos asperula, also known as Ferula asperula, is a perennial herb plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds like ferulic acid, asperuloside, and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Prangos asperula include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Prangos asperula is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
